criteria.description: Request/control-line recognition and escape handling for scoped subset.
Deterministic .de/.am expansion behavior on fixture corpus.
Fill/no-fill and line-break behavior against expected text output.
Fixture provenance, contamination controls, and reproducible run records.

acceptance_gates: Write bounded scope markdown under results/reports/
Map each included feature to >=1 fixture id
Include contamination-control checklist in scope report
